summary: DMT E2E Flow Testing - All backend API and Playwright tests passed
seed_data_creation: None required - tests use existing API endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: All DMT Admin API endpoints tested and working correctly. Tests cover: Health Check, Admin Settings CRUD, Enable/Disable DMT, Set Daily Limit, Transactions with filters, Stats Dashboard, Wallet API, and Error Handling for disabled DMT.

features_tested.DMT Health Check with enabled status: PASSED - Health endpoint returns correct status, enabled flag, daily_limit, config_valid
features_tested.Admin Settings GET/POST: PASSED - GET returns all fields (enabled, daily_limit_inr, min_transfer_inr, prc_to_inr_rate). POST updates enabled and daily_limit correctly
features_tested.Admin Enable/Disable DMT: PASSED - POST /admin/enable and /admin/disable work correctly. Status reflects in health endpoint immediately
features_tested.Admin Set Daily Limit: PASSED - POST /admin/set-limit accepts limits 100-200000. Rejects invalid limits (<100 or >200000). Changes reflect in health endpoint
features_tested.Admin Get All Transactions with filters: PASSED - GET /admin/transactions returns summary, transactions, pagination. Filters work: status, date_from, date_to, mobile, limit, skip
features_tested.Admin Stats Dashboard: PASSED - GET /admin/stats returns today stats, all_time stats, and current settings
features_tested.Customer Search: PASSED - POST /customer/search returns customer_exists, state, can_transact for existing customers
features_tested.Customer Registration: PASSED - POST /customer/register creates new customer with state (1 or 2)
features_tested.Wallet API with dynamic limit: PASSED - GET /wallet/{user_id} returns 404 for non-existent users. Daily limit from settings reflected
features_tested.Daily Limit Enforcement: PASSED - Admin set limit changes reflect across health, settings, and stats endpoints
features_tested.Error Handling for disabled DMT: PASSED - When DMT disabled, health shows DMT DISABLED status
